M-034.NAME: disaster-recovery-runbook
M-034.owns: Operator runbook for emergency relocation to fresh RU/DE servers using the existing approved deployment process

exports.flow-backup-freeze: Defines maintenance-window freeze and backup capture order
exports.flow-restore-new-servers: Defines restore sequence after fresh deployment on replacement servers
exports.flow-cutover-validation: Defines health, handshake, admin, billing, and DNS/IP cutover checks

constraints.constraint-1: Existing deploy and install scripts are treated as operator-approved black-box deployment tools.
constraints.constraint-2: The runbook must not require changing deploy/, install.sh, or the current password-based deploy flow.
constraints.constraint-3: Recovery must be possible with explicit operator steps and rollback checkpoints.

M-034.hotspot: H-021: Disaster recovery must use existing operator-approved deploy/install scripts as a black-box deployment surface
